sessionEnd.bash: git-stacks service signal publish --state completed --source copilot --workspace "git-stacks" --workspace-id "$GIT_STACKS_WORKSPACE_ID" --repository-id "$GIT_STACKS_REPOSITORY_ID" --surface-id "$GIT_STACKS_SURFACE_ID"

errorOccurred.bash: git-stacks service signal publish --state failed --source copilot --workspace "git-stacks" --workspace-id "$GIT_STACKS_WORKSPACE_ID" --repository-id "$GIT_STACKS_REPOSITORY_ID" --surface-id "$GIT_STACKS_SURFACE_ID"

preToolUse.bash: input=$(cat); toolName=$(echo "$input" | grep -o '"toolName":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); if [ "$toolName" = "AskUserQuestion" ]; then git-stacks service signal publish --state waiting --source copilot --workspace "git-stacks" --workspace-id "$GIT_STACKS_WORKSPACE_ID" --repository-id "$GIT_STACKS_REPOSITORY_ID" --surface-id "$GIT_STACKS_SURFACE_ID"; fi

userPromptSubmitted.bash: git-stacks service signal publish --state working --source copilot --workspace "git-stacks" --workspace-id "$GIT_STACKS_WORKSPACE_ID" --repository-id "$GIT_STACKS_REPOSITORY_ID" --surface-id "$GIT_STACKS_SURFACE_ID"

postToolUse.bash: input=$(cat); toolName=$(echo "$input" | grep -o '"toolName":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); if [ "$toolName" = "AskUserQuestion" ]; then git-stacks service signal publish --state idle --source copilot --workspace "git-stacks" --workspace-id "$GIT_STACKS_WORKSPACE_ID" --repository-id "$GIT_STACKS_REPOSITORY_ID" --surface-id "$GIT_STACKS_SURFACE_ID"; fi
